productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Maestro Flight Black Sports Shoes
description: nike has outdone itself again with this new nike Air Flight Maestro Plus. Basketball fans will see the lines connecting even as you compare the original and this particular shoe. Bag that hoop with this pair of Nike Air Flight Maestro Plus shoes that are designed for basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport.UpperSynthetic and suede upper with mesh panels on both sidesAnkle length for better foot movementSynthetic Nike swoosh on both sides of the mid-footPadded synthetic tongue and collar that has fabric lining for snug comfortDouble lace up system for a snug, customised FitFlight logo embroidered on the neoprene black tongueMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOut sole reinforced onto the mid sole on the sides and toe boxAir capsules on the sides of the heelOutsoleTPR out-sole with herringbone pattern for maximum traction and optimal performanceRevamped Air pocket in the heel and brand name embossed for maximum grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
